sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n1202" key="a)delfodo/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀδελφ-οδότης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n1202.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bestowing brothers</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἀστήρ</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:123:21" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">123.21</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
